title: Better Teleport
description: Teleport to other players through an intuitive GUI-based request system.
body:
Better Teleport

### 🗨️ About **Better Teleport** is a mod that adds a GUI-based player teleportation system to your game, making it easy and intuitive to teleport directly to other players. You can open the teleportation menu by pressing the **"R"** key (or any key you have assigned) while in-game.

### 🏃 Teleport System From the **"Players"** section of the teleportation menu, you can view all active players on the server and send teleport requests to them.

Players you send a request to can either accept or decline it from the **"Pending Requests"** menu. If your request is accepted, you will be teleported directly to that player. However, players who are in a different dimension will not appear in the player list *(Resolved in 0.0.2)*, and you will not be able to send teleport requests to them.
